FD Furor Davidis
Disconnected | AI | decoy: -
VPS connection
Decoy domains (xray facade)
The first domain is used during deploy. HotSwap rotates this list.
Deploy log
AWG tunnel
x Disconnected
Deploy is complete. Click Connect to start the tunnel.
HotSwap decoy domain
Changes the active xray decoy domain without dropping AWG.
Connection status
AWG port- Active decoy- Physical IP-
HotSwap
AI orchestrator
x AI
Last action- Session0 min AI model-
Adaptive live
Enabled- Mode- Session (min)- URL count- Chain depth- Site cap- RAG weight- Timeout policy-
Cover Sites
Cover traffic goes through the physical adapter, bypassing AWG. Uses uTLS fingerprints for realistic web traffic.
AI prompt
System prompt is capped at 700 characters to keep requests compact for small models.
AI log
RAG memory
Stores patterns that worked in your network and injects them into AI prompts. File: furor_memory.json.
Top entries
Local files
Server
Requirements
Install LM Studio and start Local Server.
Put AWG files next to FurorDavidis.exe:
FurorDavidis.exe
awg\
    amneziawg.exe
    wintun.dll
Interface language
Servers & Clients
Each profile keeps a separate VPS/AWG/AI config. Switching profile stops active AI and disconnects AWG.
AI backend (LM Studio)
Open LM Studio -> Local Server -> load model -> Start Server.
Recommended: Qwen3-1.7B or any instruct model.
If your PC is low on compute, consider 0.6B models.
AWG
